name: Zhejiang Sunoren Solar Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Sunoren Solar Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the photovoltaic industry in China. It develops solar power stations; produces solar modules; manufactures silicon wafers; and researches and develops in the field of photovoltaic manufacturing and distributed photovoltaic power plants. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Haining, China.
